intent: Ship cohesive UX polish: reduce card density ~20% on Learning Paths and Authors pages, add cover image customization, and redesign the DevOps Roadmap detail page into a map-first experience with list toggle and unified focus panel. Fix accessibility blockers across all touched surfaces. Round 2: re-check gap resolution context (P1) and storage ordering (P2) fixes from Round 1.

findings.title: FocusPanel 'Up Next' includes unresolved gap entries as 'Unknown Course'
findings.suggested_fix: Add `if (e.courseId === '') return false` guard before the completionPct check in upcomingEntries filter

findings.title: currentIndex computed via indexOf on full entries array includes gap entries, potentially misaligning trail map CURRENT marker
findings.suggested_fix: Compute currentIndex by filtering out gap entries first, or use findIndex with a predicate that skips gaps

findings.title: Hardcoded Tailwind gradient color classes (e.g. 'from-cyan-400 to-blue-600') in GRADIENTS array
findings.suggested_fix: Consider extracting gradient colors as CSS custom properties in theme.css for consistency. Low priority since gradients are decorative, not semantic.

appliedFixes.description: Added `if (e.courseId === '') return false` guard to exclude unresolved gap entries from Up Next section

p1_gapResolutionContext.verification: GapContext interface added, trigger accepts gap parameter, ImportWizardDialog accepts gapEntryId/searchTerm props, replaceGapEntry store method added with optimistic update + rollback, import wizard auto-resolves gaps on import, course picker resolves gaps on match/replace

p2_storageOrdering.verification: handleRemove now captures previous cover state, updates store optimistically first, then deletes from Supabase Storage, with proper store rollback on storage failure

testingGaps: No unit test coverage for new FocusPanel gap-entry filtering
No integration test for gap resolution flow end-to-end (import wizard → replaceGapEntry → list refresh)
No test for TrailMap currentIndex with mixed gap/real entries

coverage.suppressedDetail: R2-003 (PathCardHeader hardcoded gradient colors) suppressed at 0.60 confidence threshold
